content.text:
```mdl
@ Contract: Confidentiality and Non‑Disclosure Agreement (CNDA)
module contract_nli_no_align_dev_10_nda_8

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Types
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
type Party = {
    name: string
}

type ReceivingParty = {
    name: string,
    # true when a legal, regulatory or judicial process forces disclosure
    is_legal_disclosure_required: bool,
    # true when the Disclosing Party has been notified of the impending disclosure
    has_notified_disclosing_party: bool
}

type DisclosingParty = {
    name: string
}

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Entities (public model objects)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2.01 – Parties to the CNDA
entity receiving_party: ReceivingParty

@ Clause 2.01 – Parties to the CNDA
entity disclosing_party: DisclosingParty

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Rules (deontic requirements)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
@ Clause 2.06 – Disclosure Required by Law
rule O notify_disclosing_before_legal_disclosure:
    receiving_party.is_legal_disclosure_required
        implies receiving_party.has_notified_disclosing_party now

# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
# Optional helper functions (none needed for this simple rule)
# ----------------------------------------------------------------------
```
